productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Light Winter Black Tshirts
description: CompositionDark grey pique polo T-shirt made of 100% cotton, that has short sleeves, black ribbed collar and cuffs, tape detailing on the inseam of the collar, rugged chest placket, brand badge appliqued on the upper left chest, huge brand print in a rubber print on the back and vented hemsFittingRegularWash careMachine wash in 30 degrees using mild detergentDo not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleachDry flat in shadeWarm ironDo not iron directly on print/embroideryUpdate your sophisticated style with this dark grey polo T-shirt from United Colours of Benetton. The appliqued brand brand badge on the upper left chest and the brand image in a rubber print adds an interesting element to this tee, while the cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with jeans or chinos and comfortable-yet-stylish lifestyle footwear from the wide collection available at myntra for casual occasions.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5'11", Shoulders-18"
